name: trammel-pe
description: Trammel PE — Trace the arc from idea to execution. Generate structured, tool-aware prompts for any LLM agent.

server.name: trammel-pe
server.description: Generate structured, tool-aware prompts for any LLM agent using the Trammel PE framework. 9-section structured prompts with task decomposition, tool selection, self-learning loops, prompt chaining, and 3-language support.

tools.name: generate_prompt
tools.description: Generate a structured, tool-aware prompt for any LLM agent using the Trammel PE framework. Returns a complete prompt with 9 sections: Objective, Role & Tone, Success Criteria, Scope, Tools, Task Decomposition, Context & Data, Output Format, Constraints, and optional Self-Learning Loop.

objective.description: What you want the agent to do (verb-first, specific)

tools.name: generate_from_template
tools.description: Generate a prompt from a built-in Trammel PE template. Templates: competitive, data-analysis, content-writing, api-design, code-review, security-audit. Optionally override objective and domain.

objective.description: What you want the agent to do. REQUIRED.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available Trammel PE prompt templates with descriptions.

tools.name: generate_chain
tools.description: Generate a sequential prompt chain from a list of prompt configs. Each step's output feeds the next step via the {{prev_output}} placeholder. Returns a Markdown mega-prompt with stage gates, or a JSON chain spec. Trammel generates the artifact; the consuming agent executes the chain.

steps.description: Ordered list of prompt configs (same fields as generate_prompt). Use {{prev_output}} in steps 2+.
